wins: Revenue and EPS both exceeded consensus estimates
Data Center segment revenue increased 57% year-over-year
Strong growth in AI accelerator and EPYC and Ryzen CPU sales
Significant expansion of enterprise adoption of EPYC instances
risks: Export controls for Instinct MI308X shipments to China
Sequential decline in Data Center segment revenue
Inventory levels increased due to ramping of new products
Uncertainty around macroeconomic and regulatory environments
